title: Delete blocked words
content:
Use this endpoint to delete one or more blocked words from the blocked word list. When a blocked word is deleted, comments that contain this word will become public instead of being visible only to the commentor. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/blockedword/delete/| /v1.3/blockedword/delete/| |Request parameter data type|`advertiser_id`: number |`advertiser_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/blockedword/delete/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {required}|string| Content type of the request. Allowed value: `application/json`| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {required}|string| Advertiser ID | |blocked_words {required}|string[]| List of blocked words that you want to delete.

Note: If you attempt to delete a word that is not on the blocked word list, no errors will occur. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/blockedword/delete/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "blocked_words": [ "hell" ] }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |message|string|The return message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |code |number|The return code. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |data |object|The returned data| |request_id |string|Unique ID of the request | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code); ```
